2605.10862.title: RUBEN: Rule-Based Explanations for Retrieval-Augmented LLM Systems
2605.10862.paper_summary: This paper demonstrates RUBEN, an interactive tool for discovering minimal rules to explain the outputs of retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) in data-driven applications. We leverage novel pruning strategies to efficiently identify a minimal set of rules that subsume all others. We further demonstrate novel applications of these rules for LLM safety, specifically to test the resiliency of safety training and effectiveness of adversarial prompt injections.
2605.10862.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文展示了RUBEN，一個互動工具，用於發現最小規則，以解釋數據驅動應用中檢索增強大型語言模型（LLMs）的輸出。<lb/>我們利用新穎的修剪策略來有效識別一組最小規則，這些規則包含了所有其他規則。<lb/>我們進一步展示了這些規則在LLM安全性方面的新應用，特別是測試安全訓練的韌性和對抗性提示注入的有效性。
2605.10862.author: Joel Rorseth et.al.
2605.10862.authors: Joel Rorseth, Parke Godfrey, Lukasz Golab, Divesh Srivastava, Jarek Szlichta
